heading: Definitions
label: 27 Definitions
text: The terms “State” and “States,” as used in this chapter, shall be held to include the District of Columbia.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, means chapter XV of , , which, insofar as classified to the Code, enacted sections 24 to 27 of this title and amended . For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.act July 9, 1918, ch. 14340 Stat. 887section 28 of this title
